privileged_info_summary: The task is synthetic and creates a bathroom renovation calculator spreadsheet with 6 material items (floor tile, wall tile, waterproof membrane, paint, tile adhesive, grout). Material data values are all verified correct: prices range from $19.99-$89.99, budgets from $100-$500, coverage from 11-350 sq ft, with mixed units (decimal feet and centimeters). The unit conversion factor 1 cm = 1/30.48 feet is mathematically correct. Example calculations in the README for floor tile and waterproof membrane are largely accurate; however, the waterproof membrane area example claims 24.53 sq ft when the correct calculation yields 24.46 sq ft (a 0.07 sq ft discrepancy due to rounding, within verifier tolerance of 0.2). All material data in setup_task.sh matches the data in README's Expected Data table. Waste factor recommendations (10-15% for tile, 5-10% for other materials) are reasonable and all provided values fall within these ranges. Task contains no explicit 'metadata' field to audit.
